questionHtml: Find the distance from the camp to point C.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to use cosine rule      (M1)

AC2 = 3.152 + 4.62 − 2 × 3.15 × 4.6 cos 101° (or equivalent)       A1

AC = 6.05 (km)        A1

 

[3 marks]
